title: Lumina Dashboard
description: A glassmorphic data visualization platform for creative agencies.
longDescription: Lumina Dashboard is a high-performance analytics platform designed for creative professionals. It features real-time data streaming, customizable widgets, and a beautiful glassmorphic interface that reduces cognitive load while providing deep insights into project performance.

title: Clay Studio
description: A collaborative 3D modeling tool for web designers.
longDescription: Clay Studio brings the power of 3D modeling to the browser with a simplified, designer-friendly interface. Built with Three.js and React, it allows teams to collaborate on 3D assets in real-time, exporting directly to web-optimized formats.

title: Neon Nexus
description: Real-time crypto tracker with immersive dark mode aesthetics.
longDescription: Neon Nexus is a premier cryptocurrency monitoring suite that prioritizes aesthetic immersion without sacrificing technical depth. It tracks over 5,000 assets with millisecond latency, featuring advanced charting and portfolio management tools.
